'''razhava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwela|kwela]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwela|kwela]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| razhava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzhævæth|ræzhævæth]] || [[word:ræzhævæj|ræzhævæj]] || [[word:ræzhævæsh|ræzhævæsh]] || [[word:ræzhævæ|ræzhævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:razhazhavath|razhazhavath]] || [[word:razhazhavaj|razhazhavaj]] || [[word:razhazhavash|razhazhavash]] || [[word:razhazhava|razhazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:razhavath|razhavath]] || [[word:razhavaj|razhavaj]] || [[word:razhavash|razhavash]] || [[word:razhava|razhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:razhafvath|razhafvath]] || [[word:razhafvaj|razhafvaj]] || [[word:razhafvash|razhafvash]] || [[word:razhafvaf|razhafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razhavatha|razhavatha]] || [[word:razhavaja|razhavaja]] || [[word:razhavasha|razhavasha]] || [[word:razhavaka|razhavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razhavath|razhavath]] || [[word:razhavaj|razhavaj]] || [[word:razhavash|razhavash]] || [[word:razhava|razhava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razhavathal|razhavathal]] || [[word:razhavajal|razhavajal]] || [[word:razhavashal|razhavashal]] || [[word:razhavakal|razhavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razhavathatha|razhavathatha]] || [[word:razhavajaja|razhavajaja]] || [[word:razhavashasha|razhavashasha]] || [[word:razhavaka|razhavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razhavathan|razhavathan]] || [[word:razhavajan|razhavajan]] || [[word:razhavashan|razhavashan]] || [[word:razhavakan|razhavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razhavathaoro|razhavathaoro]] || [[word:razhavajaoro|razhavajaoro]] || [[word:razhavashaoro|razhavashaoro]] || [[word:razhavakaoro|razhavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
